channel.title: MIX Fold 4 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

image.title: MIX Fold 4 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.306.0.WNVCNXM Fastboot update for MIX Fold 4 China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: MIX Fold 4 China

Codename: goku

Version: OS3.0.306.0.WNVCNXM | 16.0

Size: 9.7 GB

MD5: 8d1dced99cc9ac57f76d7a7e0e48dd80

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Occasional stability issues in some cases
Updated the security patch to May 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
